field_group.brief: Counterparty and book/portfolio relationships for a trade.
field_group.description:
One of five field-groups that compose trading::domain::trade via
rfl::Flatten<T>.  See trade_identity_field_group.json for the
rationale behind the sub-struct decomposition.

This group carries the party relationship fields (book, portfolio,
counterparty, and optional successor trade).

fields.name: book_id
fields.description: Book that owns this trade (soft FK to ores_refdata_books_tbl).

fields.name: portfolio_id
fields.description: Portfolio this trade belongs to (soft FK to ores_refdata_portfolios_tbl).

fields.name: successor_trade_id
fields.description: UUID of the trade that replaced this one (e.g. after novation). Absent for active trades.
